input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The java-run failure appears to be a version/JDK behavior test issue, not missing setup: local verification with the existing scaffold and OGNL 3.3.5 failed one ObjectPropertyAccessor expectation on JDK 25.

OGNL has optional system-property-controlled paths such as ognl.security.manager, ognl.UseJDK9PlusAccessHandler, ognl.UseStricterInvocation, and ognl.UseFirstMatchGetSetLookup, but documentation/source comments describe them as optional behavior switches, not prerequisites for baseline coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is an in-memory Java expression/property navigation library; the resolved 3.3.5 artifact already declares its required runtime dependency on Javassist transitively, and normal meaningful tests use local Java fixture objects rather than external services or extra test dependencies.
